title: Bearer token 只用於本次測試，不保存；範例固定使用
trans: Bearer token is only used for this test and will not be saved; the example is fixed for use.

title: Token 明文只會在建立當下顯示一次。新 Token 會自動套用管理員授權給你的 mode。
trans: Token plain text will only be displayed once when it is created. The new Token will automatically apply the mode authorized to you by the administrator.

title: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS，留空表示不設定
trans: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS, leave blank to not set

title: ○ Controlled Volume Binding（受控 Volume 掛載）
○ External Database Profile（外部資料庫設定）
○ Generic Service Publishing（通用服務發佈）
使用 GET，不需要欄位。
trans: With GET, no fields are required.

title: 依系統設定，公開 API 文件可能僅允許本機讀取。
trans: Depending on system settings, public API files may only be read by the local machine.

title: 儀表板只讀 SQLite 最新監測快照；主機探測請由 CLI / cron 執行。
trans: Dashboard read-only latest SQLite monitoring snapshot; host probing should be performed by CLI/cron.

title: 全部開放最簡單是不要設定任何規則。
trans: The easiest way to open everything up is to not set any rules.

title: 到 API 測試場
trans: Go to the API test site

title: 前往 API 金鑰建立
只顯示你自己的 Token API 用量。
trans: Only show your own Token API usage.

title: 安裝、啟用、公開 AI 服務。
trans: Install, enable, and expose AI services.

title: 尚未執行測試。
trans: Testing has not been performed yet.

title: 已完成：Docker 服務生命週期、健康檢查、Gateway。
trans: Completed: Docker service life cycle, health check, Gateway.

title: 已完成：mode route、Bearer Token、IP control、稽核記錄。
trans: Completed: mode route, Bearer Token, IP control, audit records.

title: 後台 server side 呼叫本機
trans: The background server side calls this machine

title: 薄版已完成：Local Job Contract、aihub-run、workspace。
trans: Thin version completed: Local Job Contract, aihub-run, workspace.

title: 薄版已完成：runtime_runs、資源取樣、logs/result index。
trans: Thin version completed: runtime_runs, resource sampling, logs/result index.

title: 這裡只顯示你被授權可使用的 API mode。內部主機與 runtime 細節不會顯示。
trans: Only the API modes you are authorized to use are displayed here. Internal host and runtime details are not shown.

title: 這裡管理的是自己的 Token IP 白名單。未設定任何規則時，Token 不限制來源 IP；有設定時必須符合其中一條。
trans: What is managed here is its own Token IP whitelist. When no rules are set, Token does not restrict the source IP; when set, it must comply with one of them.

trans: If there is no token yet, please first
